column3: Garlic Tea is a herbal concoction made by infusing garlic cloves and other spices into hot water, providing rich medicinal benefits like anti-inflammatory effects.
Garlic Capsules is a supplement or capsule that holds encased garlic, which offers individuals the health benefits of this spice without having to cook and consume it directly.

Garlic Extracts is a concentrated form of garlic that contains all of its valuable components, such as sulfur compounds, vitamins, and minerals, which are distilled and then mixed with other solvents to create a potent supplement.

Garlic Tablets is a form of supplementation taken for its various health benefits, mainly derived from concentrated garlic extract encapsulated within small pills or tablets, designed for easier consumption and absorption compared to raw garlic.

Garlic Oil is a concentrated form of garlic that has been extracted from its bulbs and processed into an edible oil, which can be used for various culinary purposes such as seasoning dishes or enhancing their flavors.

Garlic Supplements is a dietary supplement that contains extract from garlic bulbs, aiming at providing various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular functions and supporting immune system boost while enhancing overall well-being through increased antioxidant properties.

Garlic Powder is a fine and flavorful spice derived from dried garlic bulbs, which has been pulverized into a powdery form for easy use in various culinary applications, enhancing the taste of dishes without requiring direct pieces or the pungent smell associated with fresh garlic.

Garlic Ointments is a topical preparation derived from garlic, which is commonly used for its medicinal purposes in treating various skin conditions and providing relief due to its natural antibacterial properties.

Garlic Poultice is a mixture made by combining crushed or cut garlic cloves with warm water, which is then applied directly on affected areas of skin using natural poultice cloth to alleviate pain and soothe inflammations.

Garlic Tinctures is an alcohol-based extract made using whole or ground garlic cloves that has been infused for a certain period of time, allowing it to capture and preserve the natural properties of garlic in a concentrated form which can be taken orally or topically.
